back when the game was only a game where there were white portals you would go in to play the maps, i bought $31 worth of mods. Once it got an update, i got on anddddd it took away everything i had. They also added in game currency along with it, so i lost my cosmetics. I wish i could show photo evidence because this is criminal.

2024 I used to get back home from school run to my headset and get on went into my favorite map run people think it’s overrated but I don’t care. I always had a good time in each map. I love the game I spent about 50 bucks on it I don’t care if I got a refund you know I got all my ￼ memories  from this game ￼. I know OG fun monkey ￼ horror , but I want this game pacifically. Back I was here when the game was just a gorilla ￼ tag remake instead of  this  we have today it was just a gorilla tag map with monsters and every single map. I remember me and my friend we used to go to mountains and go down the slide and get we get scared so badly . I miss it ￼￼ the game so much fun we’re having a good times go. I remember getting yelled at for playing for three hours on that game and then the update came out when the game changed. We had to go down the elevator and there’s all maps that I have I like the most was in that map where we were in a white room and outside there’s a bunch of maps for where all the Slendytubbies one of my favorites to my general opinion, but I want the other ￼ update  came out when had like we were able to like make ourselves ragdoll. That was a good update. Good times why would fun horror ￼ monkey will never be the same how it used to be the potential the owner he use all this to potential ￼ where had the times go.  Until that one day when the game got hacked by mods the one that downloads hacks ￼￼I remember they used to spawn a bunch of elephants, and I remembered that run monster used to turn into that scary Roblox face. I still miss it up to the day. I don’t really play anymore cause it doesn’t feel like how he used to feel like I ￼ remember sky box love the map. Also remember, ￼ running away, pretending my gun actually works shooting at the monster when I think about it, I was so stupid as a kid me and my friend were just two kids running around the map and then OG fun monkey got released. I played it when it was like a good map cause the map got rotated each update but now it just it’s not good anymore and then fearing gorilla ￼ got a release ￼￼ and that’s where the story ends this game ever comes back. I will play it and enjoy all my memories. If you want to subscribe to me, you don’t have to. I’m just saying.  My channel is  cocovin vr you don’t have to. I’m just saying if you don’t have a channel that’s OK. You could just watch me but ￼ where have the time go. This game will always have a place in my heart like capuchin ￼￼

reviews.review_title: This game is a scam and a complete joke
reviews.review_description:
I personally LOVED this game I would literally play it everyday during summer . But someone gave it a virus I don’t know how my friend told me about it. Before that I actually bought the 10$ AND 20$ mod pack =30$ + tax. that’s A LOT of money for a game in my
Opinion .. right so they got rid of the virus COOL then they did a HUGEE update.. I tried playing it . I went into EVERY popular server and there was NOBODY in them .??!! whatever I go to the elevator to get my mods equipped wth I don’t have my mods? I’m sitting here thinking “it’s probally a bug wtv “ reset my game 10 times .. nothing? School starts !! I haven’t touched that game in 3 months. Today since may is th first time I’ve been on the gam. I check to see if I FIALLY have my mods .??? Nothing. I text the discord they tell me it’s probally because I didn’t reset my app or it’s js a bug right a bug😐 overall ghis game sucks now, it’s boring. With all due respect your game is completely trash now :/ rip fmh

Fun monke horror has a history not many people fully know That's weird.  CHAPTER1: its creation date is unknown, but there is video on youtube showing its first version: a dark room and a computer with a maze connected to it.     MAPS: the first maps were buttons (that would soon become portals) but here's a list.    188  area51 place v1, place v2, maze shyguymaze, place crawlspace run meetup sandbox levelfun mansion hide vent.   CHAPTER2:  before it boomed in popularity it was just a copy of gthorror, Not much to note here.          CHAPTER 3:THE BOOM after they added doors(or portals) it was super popular jman even covered it, it was the best until...   THE OWNER: he was accused of: DOXXING,SWATTING,GROOMING these left a big impression on the players they left and the games players crumbled along with him deleting maps for worse ones.    where it is now: chomp18 decided to stop the updates after the game was hacked, for now this is the end. Placev1: Alright so i loaded up into fmh and i saw the buttons, one was weird it just said "place" so i clicked it and i was teleported to a house in the middle of nowhere there was a road so we went down and found a watchtower, we walked some more and there was a mansion,  i think it just an Upscaled version but something was so surreal about it .     edit: you can see the creation date in the thing with the age rating
